acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in targeted mode (Parallel Reaction Monitoring –PRM).
alkylation reagent: Purified sCGrx1p (94 μM, 50 μL) was incubated with NEM or IAA (20x concentrated, 2 mM from the 50 mM stock, 5 % DMSO) at 4 °C, for 16 h.
cleavage agent: Cells were then trypsinized (with warm 0.5 % trypsin with EDTA at 37 °C for 2 min).
collision energy: a fixed normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30 % applying HCD activation.
enrichment method: The B4GALT1-sCGrx1p-HA protein was immunoprecipitated with anti-HA magnetic beads.
fragmentation method: a fixed normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30 % applying HCD activation.
instrument: LC-MS/MS analysis was performed on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Scientific).
ionization type: eluted proteins were ionized by electron-spray ionization (ESI) in positive mode.
labeling: using light and heavy iodoacetamide labeling (L- and H-IAA, respectively).
reduction reagent: glutathionylation can be reversed using tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine (TCEP).
reduction concentration: 0.5 mM TCEP was added to the protein.
